name: Hokuriku Electric Industry Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hokuriku Electric Industry Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells electronic components in Japan and internationally. The company offers pressure sensors, force sensors, 3-axis acceleration sensors, pressure sensor modules, barometric pressure sensors, humidity sensors elements and modules; circuit modules; high frequency components; piezoelectric products; chip fixed resistors and network chip fixed resistors; and metal plate chip fixed resistors. It also provides fixed metal film, fixed metal oxide film, and fixed carbon film resistors; chip type and miniature cermet trimmer potentiometers; NTC thermistors; tactile switches; and printed circuit boards. The company's products are used in mobile communication, digital appliance/PC, car electronic, and home electronic applications. The company was founded in 1943 and is based in Toyama, Japan.
